arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen BOMBSHELL as Arsenal transfer agreed
arts.sum: Plus, an Arsenal transfer was agreed and Chelsea suffered a nightmare blow. Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim is demanding 'one or two big signings' this summer.

arts.ttl: European soccer review: Barcelona miss chance to push Real Madrid further from title race
arts.sum: Meanwhile, Real Madrid's loss this weekend left an opening for Barcelona to pull away further in the LaLiga title race, but Barcelona stumbled on Saturday, keeping the table close enough that it's still anyone's trophy. While Liverpool's loss on Sunday was a setback in what appears to be their inevitable Premier League title, Southampton have wasted no time in swiftly exiting the league as the fastest team to ever be relegated.

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta needs to make one signing at Arsenal that's even more important than a new striker - opinion
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is begging for such a signing at Arsenal 😭

arts.ttl: Nico Paz sends message to Real Madrid starlet after Valencia clash
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid starlet Nico Paz has this weekend sent a message of support and congratulations to a current member of Los Blancos’ ranks. The player in question? Fran González.…

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Real Madrid: Best stats ahead of Champions League quarter-final first leg
arts.sum: Ahead of Tuesday's Champions League quarter-final first leg between Arsenal and Real Madrid, Sports Mole takes a look at the best stats relating to the game.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres makes major statement after Arsenal transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres continued his fine current run of form with a player of the match-winning performance for Sporting CP in the first leg of their Portuguese Cup semi-final. Gyokeres scored the second goal in their 2-0 win against Rio Ave at the Jose Alvalade Stadium after dinking a penalty down the middle.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior equals Ronaldo's Real Madrid scoring record
arts.sum: Vinicius Junior tied Ronaldo for the most goals scored by a Brazilian in Real Madrid history.

arts.ttl: Arsenal can sign Cole Palmer 2.0 after David Ornstein revelation
arts.sum: Morgan Rogers is 'generating big admirers,' according to David Ornstein, and the data suggests that Arsenal could be his ideal next step. Arsenal can sign Cole Palmer 2.0 after David Ornstein revelation

arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Arsenal's chances in Premier League title race after Liverpool slip-up
arts.sum: A supercomputer predicts the Premier League title race between Arsenal and Liverpool after the Reds' 3-2 defeat to Fulham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool's fixtures compared as the Premier League title race takes another twist
arts.sum: The Gunners will host Real Madrid at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night for the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinal . While Arteta would probably much prefer to play Real Madrid at home in the second leg, Arsenal have a brilliant chance to establish a lead over the reigning European champions.
